deviations.what: the original binds src/mode to a JSONModel (img>/products, /imageMode); these fixed sample values are inlined here as literals (mode Background, the HT-7777 / HT-6100 demo images). height/width are restored over the device> model, see below.

image height/width are device dependent in the original (imageHeight/imageWidth = 5em on a phone, 10em otherwise); restored as the expression {= ${device>/system/phone} ? '5em' : '10em' } over the framework's device> model (image 4 keeps its fixed 6em width, exactly as the original) - confirm the images shrink on a phone.

the custom CSS class imageContainer (light blue background) of the box4 HBox is kept and the sample's styles.css (.imageContainer{background-color:#A9EAFF}) injected via a core:HTML content attribute (CAPABILITIES.md CSS row, as apps 431/404) - confirm the light-blue background renders behind image 4.
